subject: [PATCH v2 08/14] fuse: move fuse_uring_abort() from header to dev_uring.c

reviews.author: Bernd Schubert
reviews.summary: Suggested moving fuse_uring_abort() due to its internal dependencies and implementation details, but noted it was initially placed there for a specific configuration directive.

2026-04-02.patch_summary: This patch moves the fuse_uring_abort() function from an inline header definition to a C file, dev_uring.c, where it belongs due to its internal dependencies and implementation details.
